extraction_notes: The SNES version of Cho Aniki (1992) was not covered in the provided Wikipedia source material. Wikipedia documents PC Engine (1992) as the original platform, with sequels on Super Famicom and other platforms. No specific musical parameters (tempo, keys, chord progressions, or SFX characteristics) are documented for any Cho Aniki game in the available sources. The TCRF source explicitly requests content not be revealed.
